MainActivity - Class in com.example.eventsapp
The primary host activity of the application.

mapToRow(T) - Method in interface com.example.eventsapp.CSVExporter.CsvRowMapper
Maps a single domain object to its CSV column values.
matchesAvailableOnly(Event, boolean, String) - Static method in class com.example.eventsapp.ExploreFilterHelper
Returns true if the event's registration is still open (registration_end >= today).
matchesDateRange(Event, String, String) - Static method in class com.example.eventsapp.ExploreFilterHelper
Returns true if the event's date falls within [dateFrom, dateTo] inclusive.
matchesTextFilter(Event, String) - Static method in class com.example.eventsapp.ExploreFilterHelper
Returns true if the event name contains the query (case-insensitive).
